title: Garlic Crunchy Braise
description: A kid-friendly Norwegian dish featuring a fresh and dense garlic sauce that's perfect for basting and braising, making it an easy-to-make meal.
instructions: Mince the garlic cloves and sauté them in a pan with some vegetable oil until golden brown.
Add finely chopped onions to the pan, stir for about 5 minutes until soft.
Pour in beef broth and add diced tomatoes, sliced carrots, and parsnips. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and let it simmer for about 10-15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Taste the sauce and adjust with salt and pepper as needed.
Serve hot over steamed rice or mashed potatoes.
